## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss Surge AI's marketing strategy, brand narrative, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog post needs refinement: focus on showing unique insights and data, get to the point faster](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Surge AI lacks a clear brand narrative; need to shift from fear-based to powerful, forward-looking messaging](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Website redesign approved; team to implement CMS for job listings and blog updates](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)
  - [Forbes piece upcoming; opportunity to shape narrative around customers, workers, and human interest](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

## Topics

### Blog Post Refinement

  - [Current draft buries the lead; needs to highlight unique insights faster](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Focus on showing data and examples rather than telling a narrative](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Consider splitting into two focused pieces if content is too broad](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Team to help with visual presentation of data and examples](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

### Brand Narrative and Press Management

  - [Current press coverage lacks a powerful, future-oriented narrative](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - [Need to shift from "anti-hype" to showcasing Surge as a key foundation for frontier AI models](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Opportunity to be more proactive in managing press and steering stories](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Consider being more open about customers and worker demographics (e.g., Stanford professors, Harvard PhDs)](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

### Website Redesign

  - [Team given full autonomy to redesign, with two requirements:](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
    1.  CMS for job listings page
    2.  Ability to make blog copy changes without multi-day loops
  - [Focus on improving presentation of evaluations, prompts, and dialogues](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Consider building in Next.js for better interactivity](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)

### Upcoming Forbes Piece

  - [Team to provide examples and artifacts to shape the story](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)
  - [Marcel offered to be an intentional "leak" for customer information](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [Three areas to steer: customers, worker quality, and human interest angles](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

### Events and Video Content

  - [September 18th event confirmed; more dates available in October](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2003.0)
  - [Video content under review by Surge team](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2259.0)
  - [Sales deck being used in client meetings, pending potential revisions](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2338.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Edwin to review blog post tonight; team to finalize content and prepare for publication next week](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare "leak" information for Forbes piece, pending team's authorization](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1915.0)
  - [Website redesign team to implement CMS and improve blog post presentation](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2259.0)
  - [Surge team to review and provide feedback on video content](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2259.0)
  - [Continue planning and confirming future event dates](https://fathom.video/share/b-dVUatY5mJ1hRi8v7qsrr3GNgQN6wAQ?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
